Cristiano Ronaldo is a Portuguese footballer, widely regarded as one of the greatest of all time. He has played for top clubs like Manchester United, Real Madrid, Juventus, and Al-Nassr, and is known for his incredible goal-scoring ability. He has won multiple Ballon d'Or awards and major international titles with Portugal.

Lionel Messi is an Argentine footballer, often considered one of the greatest players in history. He spent the majority of his career at FC Barcelona before moving to Paris Saint-Germain and later Inter Miami. Messi has won numerous Ballon d'Or awards and has set multiple records for goals and assists.

Neymar Jr. is a Brazilian footballer known for his exceptional dribbling skills, creativity, and goal-scoring ability. He has played for clubs like Santos, FC Barcelona, and Paris Saint-Germain. Neymar is also a key player for the Brazilian national team and has won several domestic and international titles.

Kylian Mbappé is a French footballer known for his incredible speed, skill, and goal-scoring prowess. He rose to prominence with AS Monaco before transferring to Paris Saint-Germain. Mbappé has won multiple Ligue 1 titles and was a key player in France's 2018 FIFA World Cup victory.
